audit_items.proof_trace: The balance check at lines 144-147 directly and unconditionally enforces the property: `assetInBalance = order.sellToken.balanceOf(address(this))` is fetched live, and `order.sellAmount > assetInBalance` triggers an immediate revert. The only successful return path (line 175) is gated behind this check with no bypass, and the `view` modifier prevents any mid-execution balance manipulation. The zero-amount guard (line 141-143) and reentrancy guard (line 125-127) further constrain edge cases.
